title: Blackstone-backed AirTrunk to invest $30 billion in India, develop 5 GW data centre capacity by 2030
description: AirTrunk plans a massive investment of over 3 lakh crore rupees in India by 2030. This will develop more than 5 gigawatts of digital infrastructure capacity. The investment, backed by Blackstone and CPPIB, aims to support India's growing cloud and artificial intelligence needs. This significant development is expected to create thousands of jobs and boost India's global standing in technology.

title: Fangzhou Showcases AI-Powered Chronic Disease Management Solution With Tencent Health at Tencent Cloud Conference
description: BEIJING, June 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Fangzhou Inc. ('Fangzhou” or the 'Company”) (HKEX: 06086), a leading provider of AI‑driven Internet healthcare solutions, attended the 2026 Tencent Cloud AI Industry Applications Summit in Beijing, where it showcased its 'AI + Chronic Disease Services” digital solution developed in collaboration with Tencent Health. The conference, themed 'Agent in Action, Productivity in Motion,” brought together industry leaders, technology developers, and ecosystem partners to explore how AI agents are driving productivity and accelerating enterprise adoption of artificial intelligence.
